name: @ts-morph/main
description: Main github repo for ts-morph packages.

scripts.build: cd packages && deno task --cwd common build && deno task --cwd bootstrap build && deno task --cwd ts-morph build
scripts.build:deno: cd packages && deno task --cwd common build:deno && deno task --cwd bootstrap build:deno && deno task --cwd ts-morph build:deno

author: David Sherret
